title: Golden Globes 2026: Awards Winner Predictions & Odds
text: Golden Globes 2026 Odds & Predictions Summary. The 83rd Golden Globe Awards take place January 11, 2026, hosted by Nikki Glaser on CBS and Paramount+. Film Categories: Best Film Drama: Sinners leads at 67%, but Hamnet presents a strong challenge. Acting Categories: Best Actress Drama: Jessie Buckley holds over 90% projection. Best Actress Comedy/Musical: Rose Byrne favored at 88%. Best Actor Drama: Wagner Moura leads at approximately 72%. Best Actor Comedy/Musical: Timothée Chalamet holds 80%, with Leonardo DiCaprio at roughly 11%. Television: Best TV Drama: The Pitt stands at approximately 81% implied probability. Best TV Comedy: The Studio overwhelming favorite at 89%. Comedy Lead Actor: Seth Rogen strongly favored at 86%. Supporting categories show more unpredictability, with Amy Madigan near 50% for Best Supporting Actress following her Critics' Choice win.
